mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_type, identity, source, login_type, openid, unionid, douyin_openid, douyin_unionid, alipay_uid, alipay_openid, username, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, password_hash, phone_verified, email_verified, mfa_enabled, mfa_secret_encrypted, status, failed_login_count, lock_until_time, last_login_time, last_login_ip, last_login_ua, last_login_device, token_version, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE username = #{username} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE email = #{email} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE openid = #{openid} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE unionid = #{unionid} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE douyin_openid = #{douyinOpenid} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE douyin_unionid = #{douyinUnionid} AND status != 4
SELECT FROM cas_user WHERE alipay_uid = #{alipayUid} AND status != 4
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cas_user ( user_id, user_type, identity, source, login_type, openid, unionid, douyin_openid, douyin_unionid, alipay_uid, alipay_openid, username, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, password_hash, phone_verified, email_verified, mfa_enabled, mfa_secret_encrypted, status, failed_login_count, lock_until_time, token_version ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userType}, #{identity}, #{source}, #{loginType}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{douyinOpenid}, #{douyinUnionid}, #{alipayUid}, #{alipayOpenid}, #{username}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{phoneVerified}, #{emailVerified}, #{mfaEnabled}, #{mfaSecretEncrypted}, #{status}, #{failedLoginCount}, #{lockUntilTime}, #{tokenVersion} )
mapper.update: UPDATE cas_user SET last_login_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login_ip = #{loginIp}, last_login_ua = #{loginUa}, last_login_device = #{loginDevice}, login_type = #{loginType}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE cas_user SET status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE cas_user SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE cas_user SET failed_login_count = 0, lock_until_time = NULL, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE cas_user SET status = 2, lock_until_time = #{lockUntilTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
